goalDescription: Keeps dna.humaan.app online, maintains the marketplace catalog, funds security updates, and supports community issue triage.

tiers.name: Supporter
tiers.summary: Help keep DNA free and maintained.
benefits: Public sponsor ledger (website + repository + npm credits)
GitHub Sponsor badge on your profile

tiers.name: Developer
tiers.summary: For engineers who run DNA regularly.
benefits: Linked name in README sponsor ledger

tiers.name: Team
tiers.summary: For engineering teams standardising on DNA.
benefits: Team or company name + link in README
Priority issue triage for your stack

tiers.name: Company
tiers.summary: For organisations depending on DNA in production.
benefits: Logo on dna.humaan.app (monthly homepage rotation when provided)
Featured placement in README sponsor ledger
